verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve read about the fishermen Who left their nets to follow him And nothing was greater than When Christ called their names I’ve read about Mary Magdalene And Oh how that story touched me When the Lord visited her Then her life was transformed I've read of Zachaeus meeting Jesus, the Son of God His life was changed And then he made right all that was wrong I've read of a man of the Gaderenes Possessed by a legion of demons But the Lord delivered him with great Authority and he was set free

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is the day of visitation Though you may feel so unforgiven God loves the insignificant He will cleanse, renew And restore you to perfection Rejoice and accept His invitation Call on Him, He has made a way for you This is the day of visitation The Lord Himself now dwells amongst us So nothing is impossible Oh you who were bound in sin If you can recognize His voice within Today is the day of complete redemption

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now we know God's tremendous miracles That has been displayed As a sign of His visitation Yes we are the children of Abraham And we are walking in the faith For we stand in confidence Believing that God is with us Knowing He is the same Yesterday, today, and forever Let us worship our God right now
